meta.description: USDC on Solana — canonical clean stable reference. Pool below min_pool_usd_for_h1 on Solana native chain (most USDC volume routes through Jupiter aggregator, not direct pool swaps). Signal A and B should not fire; detector returns Info/insufficient_liquidity.

token.note: For D05 purposes, USDC's primary Solana pool liquidity is tracked by Jupiter routing, not a single Raydium pool. The token-registry liquidity_usd for a single pool context may be near zero for canonical stablecoin pairs. is_established_protocol=true (jup_strict=true).

pool.note: USDC on Solana does not have a typical AMM pool with token wash-trading risk; used as canonical clean negative reference

test_assertion: assert(events.len() == 1 AND events[0].severity == Info AND evidence contains 'insufficient_liquidity')
